_comment_exploit_modules: Active ExploitModules - funding_skew_arb for multi-exchange funding arbitrage

funding_skew_arb._description: Exploits persistent funding rate skews across CEXes for time-decay asymmetry
funding_skew_arb._strategy: Earn yield on longs in +funding regimes, avoid bleed on shorts in -funding
funding_skew_arb._min_funding_comment: Minimum 0.01% (1 bps) funding rate to consider entry
funding_skew_arb._skew_delta_comment: Minimum 0.05% (5 bps) cross-exchange delta to trigger skew signal
funding_skew_arb._lookback_comment: Check funding rate sign persistence over 4 hours
funding_skew_arb._samples_comment: Require at least 3 samples showing same funding sign
funding_skew_arb._profit_target_comment: Exit at 3% profit (conservative for funding plays)
funding_skew_arb._flip_threshold_comment: Exit if funding rate flips by 0.5% (50 bps)
funding_skew_arb._exchanges_comment: Poll funding rates from these exchanges (via CCXT PUBLIC APIs)
funding_skew_arb._no_accounts_needed: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: NO ACCOUNTS REQUIRED on monitoring exchanges!
funding_skew_arb._how_it_works: Uses public CCXT endpoints - only need account on primary exchange (config.exchange.name)
funding_skew_arb._example_1: Monitor: Binance, Bybit, OKX (public data, no API keys)
funding_skew_arb._example_2: Execute trades: Binance only (API key required)
funding_skew_arb._benefit: Get cross-exchange insights without managing multiple accounts
funding_skew_arb._risk_1: Funding flip risk: mitigated by trailing exit on rate changes
funding_skew_arb._risk_2: Cross-exchange basis risk: monitored but not hedged in this version
funding_skew_arb._risk_3: Market volatility: positions can incur directional losses
funding_skew_arb._perf_1: Net carry vs baseline holding: +2-5% annualized from funding
funding_skew_arb._perf_2: Win rate: ~60-70% (depends on funding regime persistence)
funding_skew_arb._perf_3: Best conditions: Persistent directional macro moves (USD weakness, BTC rallies)
funding_skew_arb._perf_4: Avg hold time: 2-5 days per position
funding_skew_arb._note_1: Backtest with 2025-2026 funding history to measure net carry
funding_skew_arb._note_2: Start with paper trading on BTC/USDT perps
funding_skew_arb._note_3: Monitor funding rate trends across exchanges
funding_skew_arb._note_4: Works best in trending markets with persistent funding skews

_note_convexity: When combined with Convexity Seeding, funding yield flows to Convexity Buffer
_note_router: Use router.py to allocate yield-like PnL to different strategies
